subject: Coordination brief: cockatiel activities around Canberra | Frida Kahlo | Q2 review | INIT-7357
body: Here is a progress summary for the cockatiel plan in Canberra. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Frida Kahlo is cited as a case study for risk management in this domain. Reference initiative INIT-7357. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: timeline, coordination.
